고린도전서 15:1.content: Now I declare to you, brothers, the Good News which I preached to you, which also you received, in which you also stand,

고린도전서 15:2.content: by which also you are saved, if you hold firmly the word which I preached to you—unless you believed in vain.

고린도전서 15:3.content: For I delivered to you first of all that which I also received: that Christ died for our sins according to the Scriptures,

고린도전서 15:4.content: that he was buried, that he was raised on the third day according to the Scriptures,

고린도전서 15:5.content: and that he appeared to Cephas, then to the twelve.

고린도전서 15:6.content: Then he appeared to over five hundred brothers at once, most of whom remain until now, but some have also fallen asleep.

고린도전서 15:7.content: Then he appeared to James, then to all the apostles,

고린도전서 15:8.content: and last of all, as to the child born at the wrong time, he appeared to me also.

고린도전서 15:9.content: For I am the least of the apostles, who is not worthy to be called an apostle, because I persecuted the assembly of God.

고린도전서 15:10.content: But by the grace of God I am what I am. His grace which was given to me was not futile, but I worked more than all of them; yet not I, but the grace of God which was with me.

고린도전서 15:11.content: Whether then it is I or they, so we preach, and so you believed.

고린도전서 15:12.content: Now if Christ is preached, that he has been raised from the dead, how do some among you say that there is no resurrection of the dead?

고린도전서 15:13.content: But if there is no resurrection of the dead, neither has Christ been raised.

고린도전서 15:14.content: If Christ has not been raised, then our preaching is in vain, and your faith also is in vain.

고린도전서 15:15.content: Yes, we are also found false witnesses of God, because we testified about God that he raised up Christ, whom he didn’t raise up, if it is so that the dead are not raised.

고린도전서 15:16.content: For if the dead aren’t raised, neither has Christ been raised.

고린도전서 15:17.content: If Christ has not been raised, your faith is vain; you are still in your sins.

고린도전서 15:18.content: Then they also who are fallen asleep in Christ have perished.

고린도전서 15:19.content: If we have only hoped in Christ in this life, we are of all men most pitiable.

고린도전서 15:20.content: But now Christ has been raised from the dead. He became the first fruits of those who are asleep.

고린도전서 15:21.content: For since death came by man, the resurrection of the dead also came by man.

고린도전서 15:22.content: For as in Adam all die, so also in Christ all will be made alive.

고린도전서 15:23.content: But each in his own order: Christ the first fruits, then those who are Christ’s, at his coming.

고린도전서 15:24.content: Then the end comes, when he will deliver up the Kingdom to God, even the Father, when he will have abolished all rule and all authority and power.

고린도전서 15:25.content: For he must reign until he has put all his enemies under his feet.

고린도전서 15:26.content: The last enemy that will be abolished is death.

고린도전서 15:27.content: For, “He put all things in subjection under his feet.” But when he says, “All things are put in subjection”, it is evident that he is excepted who subjected all things to him.

고린도전서 15:28.content: When all things have been subjected to him, then the Son will also himself be subjected to him who subjected all things to him, that God may be all in all.

고린도전서 15:29.content: Or else what will they do who are baptized for the dead? If the dead aren’t raised at all, why then are they baptized for the dead?

고린도전서 15:30.content: Why do we also stand in jeopardy every hour?

고린도전서 15:31.content: I affirm, by the boasting in you which I have in Christ Jesus our Lord, I die daily.

고린도전서 15:32.content: If I fought with animals at Ephesus for human purposes, what does it profit me? If the dead are not raised, then “let’s eat and drink, for tomorrow we die.”

고린도전서 15:33.content: Don’t be deceived! “Evil companionships corrupt good morals.”

고린도전서 15:34.content: Wake up righteously, and don’t sin, for some have no knowledge of God. I say this to your shame.

고린도전서 15:35.content: But someone will say, “How are the dead raised?” and, “With what kind of body do they come?”

고린도전서 15:36.content: You foolish one, that which you yourself sow is not made alive unless it dies.

고린도전서 15:37.content: That which you sow, you don’t sow the body that will be, but a bare grain, maybe of wheat, or of some other kind.

고린도전서 15:38.content: But God gives it a body even as it pleased him, and to each seed a body of its own.

고린도전서 15:39.content: All flesh is not the same flesh, but there is one flesh of men, another flesh of animals, another of fish, and another of birds.

고린도전서 15:40.content: There are also celestial bodies and terrestrial bodies; but the glory of the celestial differs from that of the terrestrial.

고린도전서 15:41.content: There is one glory of the sun, another glory of the moon, and another glory of the stars; for one star differs from another star in glory.

고린도전서 15:42.content: So also is the resurrection of the dead. The body is sown perishable; it is raised imperishable.

고린도전서 15:43.content: It is sown in dishonor; it is raised in glory. It is sown in weakness; it is raised in power.

고린도전서 15:44.content: It is sown a natural body; it is raised a spiritual body. There is a natural body and there is also a spiritual body.

고린도전서 15:45.content: So also it is written, “The first man, Adam, became a living soul.” The last Adam became a life-giving spirit.

고린도전서 15:46.content: However that which is spiritual isn’t first, but that which is natural, then that which is spiritual.

고린도전서 15:47.content: The first man is of the earth, made of dust. The second man is the Lord from heaven.

고린도전서 15:48.content: As is the one made of dust, such are those who are also made of dust; and as is the heavenly, such are they also that are heavenly.

고린도전서 15:49.content: As we have borne the image of those made of dust, let’s also bear the image of the heavenly.

고린도전서 15:50.content: Now I say this, brothers, that flesh and blood can’t inherit God’s Kingdom; neither does the perishable inherit imperishable.

고린도전서 15:51.content: Behold, I tell you a mystery. We will not all sleep, but we will all be changed,

고린도전서 15:52.content: in a moment, in the twinkling of an eye, at the last trumpet. For the trumpet will sound and the dead will be raised incorruptible, and we will be changed.

고린도전서 15:53.content: For this perishable body must become imperishable, and this mortal must put on immortality.

고린도전서 15:54.content: But when this perishable body will have become imperishable, and this mortal will have put on immortality, then what is written will happen: “Death is swallowed up in victory.”

고린도전서 15:55.content: “Death, where is your sting? Hades, where is your victory?”

고린도전서 15:56.content: The sting of death is sin, and the power of sin is the law.

고린도전서 15:57.content: But thanks be to God, who gives us the victory through our Lord Jesus Christ.

고린도전서 15:58.content: Therefore, my beloved brothers, be steadfast, immovable, always abounding in the Lord’s work, because you know that your labor is not in vain in the Lord.
